name: QwQ-32B
tagline: 32B open reasoning model trained with RL, competitive with much larger reasoning models on math and code; Apache 2.
metaDescription: QwQ-32B (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-03-05 — part of the QwQ / QVQ (reasoning preview) line. 32B open reasoning model trained with RL, competitive with much…
overview: QwQ-32B is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the QwQ / QVQ (reasoning preview) line. Released 2025-03-05. Standalone open reasoning models that pioneered Qwen's chain-of-thought 'thinking' approach before it merged into the main Qwen3 family.
What's notable in this version: 32B open reasoning model trained with RL, competitive with much larger reasoning models on math and code; Apache 2.0.
